note: The uatdemo platform binaries are delivered as GitHub release assets, NOT committed to git. install-bundle.sh and the resolve_binary() runtime self-heal fetch THIS host's binary from the release (prefer the latest release; fall back to pinnedTag if set and latest is unreachable), verifying SHA-256 against the release's bundle-manifest.json. Override the source with UATDEMO_BUNDLE_SOURCE (a local dir, https prefix, or gh:owner/repo@tag).
